name: prd
description: Write a milestone PRD by grilling the user one question at a time (the /grill-me concept, each with a recommended answer) through the decision tree — goal, user stories (As a <role>, I want <capability>, so that <benefit>), scope, glossary terms, slice boundaries, acceptance checks — then writing an ordered checklist of independently-shippable executable slices to docs/prd/<slug>.md. Step 2 of the harness dev cycle.
